textByHash.c23f7e04dc5fc88b1742484dfa23d2bfcc8cb61b: Looking for a bit of meat?
textByHash.8d7ebc73a2bf38cb2189873a94c15471351a37c9: Meat! We've got all the good stuff here.
textByHash.fe0f1d36dd8db8b724d7ecd0cb0f363a85c93c69: Some prefer solids to go with their blood. That, and the werewolf visitors need something to eat too.
textByHash.325652d90290da26e6165490f93d7c538eb9c6f4: Look around you! There's no shortage of meat in these parts.
textByHash.1fb58f6c52ca765873fef3256ae78b0587bdfb03: Whatever you say. So, want some meat?
textByHash.01650f376eff147219833d66c490a93969e36014: Come back if you ever want some meat!
textByHash.db05841f9fd6cb75ea604307ac161b5b2ec77e95: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!
